quoted_tweet.text:
imagine selling your shopify brand for $1.2M

wire hits monday. 3 years of work finally paying off

3 months later the buyer texts you

"why is the store down"

while your deal was closing, a competitor in shenzhen filed your trademark. 

uspto approved it last week. 

they started dmca'ing every platform you've ever touched

shopify pulled the store
tiktok deleted the account 
fb ad account shut down 
amazon delisted 
supplier already shipping to the "new owner"

the buyer lost a 7-figure asset

guess who they're suing

you. for breach. because you sold them something you never legally owned

i've watched this kill multiple ecom deals in the last year. beauty, supplements, pet, fashion

if you're doing 30k+/month and haven't filed your trademark, you're not running a brand. you're renting it until someone takes it

https://t.co/lZv8xOk07r. 20 minutes. $350

the brand is the asset. no trademark, no business

kept.text:
https://t.co/oI6IFWTe2u

وش هو باختصار؟
هو مساعد كتابة بالذكاء الاصطناعي (AI Writing Assistant)، بس يفرق عن ChatGPT وغيره بميزة خرافية اسمها (Tone Matching).

أهم ميزاته:
1- نسخ الأسلوب: تقدر ترفع له كتاباتك السابقة أو مقالاتك، وهو يحللها ويكتب لك نصوص جديدة بنفس نبرة صوتك وطريقتك في صياغة الجمل.

2- البحث الفوري: وأنت تكتب، يقدر يبحث في الإنترنت ويجيب لك مصادر واقتباسات حقيقية ويدمجها في النص فوراً.

3- كتابة المقالات الطويلة: مصمم للأبحاث والمقالات الطويلة، ويساعدك تتجاوز "قفلة الكاتب" (Writer's Block).

4- تجاوز كاشف الذكاء الاصطناعي: يحاول يكتب بطريقة تبدو "بشرية" أكثر عشان ما تصيدك برامج مثل Turnitin بسهولة (بس طبعاً لازم تدقق وراه).

ليه يهمك؟
▪️في مشاريعك: تقدر تستخدمه لكتابة محتوى مدوناتك الأكاديمية بأسلوبك الخاص وبسرعة خيالية.

▪️تجهيز المحتوى: ممتاز لتجهيز مسودات المقالات العلمية قبل مرحلة التلميح بـ Hemingway.

(الاختصار):
▪️وظيفته: كاتب ذكاء اصطناعي "يقلد" أسلوبك الشخصي.

▪️أقوى ميزة: يدمج البحث المباشر مع الكتابة بأسلوبك (Tone Copying).

▪️فائدته: يكتب لك مسودات مقالات كاملة في ثواني وبدقة عالية.

▪️الخلاصة: هو الأداة اللي تخليك تكتب محتوى "يشبهك" بس بجهد أقل 90%.

#التحليل_الإحصائي #البحث_العلمي #الماجستير #الدكتوراه #الدراسات_العليا

kept.text:
The mind is a powerful place and what you feed it can affect you in a powerful way. 

Tobi Lutke @tobi on how you can literally change the way you think and act: 

“I was terrified of public speaking until I sat down for a week and every day I spent 10 minutes just writing that I like public speaking. And now I love public speaking.” 

“If you write something down 100 times about yourself, your brain will start reconciling you to that.”

profile_bio.description: Conversations with the greatest living founders.

quoted_tweet.text:
My conversation with Tobi Lütke (@tobi), co-founder and CEO of Shopify.

0:00 Companies as Social Technology
5:27 The Value of Reading Books: Cheat Codes for Life
7:28 Post-IPO Crisis: Cosplaying as a CEO
7:54 Competition vs Rivalry: The Power of Healthy Competition
16:02 COVID as a Turning Point: Rebuilding the Executive Team
18:21 Hiring Founders: Building a Team of High-Agency People
26:49 Shopify OS: Engineering the Company from First Principles
36:48 Compensation Innovation: Giving Employees Full Agency
40:41 The Psychology of Identity and Affirmations
48:43 Differentiation Over Perfection: Making It Your Own
50:31 Context Podcast: Documenting Decision-Making
1:26:36 The IPO Decision: Going Against Silicon Valley Orthodoxy
1:35:08 Building a Company Worth Working For
1:41:50 Hiring for Spikiness: Finding Non-Conformists
1:48:28 Office Design Philosophy: Creating Space for Excellence
1:58:54 Video Games as Business Training: StarCraft Lessons
2:07:06 AI Revolution: 2026 and Beyond
2:11:44 Focus on Craft: The Unquantifiable Elements of Excellence
2:21:08 Survivorship Bias: The Importance of Entrepreneurial Exposure
2:23:22 Closing

Includes paid partnerships.

I have met a ton of people doing 6 figures to 7 figures on whatnot now. 

Creators who buy inventory and resell. 

Actual brands who are hustling. 

A knife seller who owns a retail location and started live streaming. 

This is no joke and it feels like we are vey early to the platform. New niche ecomm playbook.

profile_bio.description: built @minikatanastore to 30M subs on YouTube & exited. business nerd. I help brands grow through video.

quoted_tweet.text:
Live commerce is one of the most engaged shopping channels right now. Now @Shopify merchants can tap into it through @Whatnot.

Products, inventory, and orders all managed from Shopify.

More surfaces to sell on. Same admin to run it from.

profile_bio.description: Entrepreneur // @Shopify President // @BigShotPodcast Creator

kept.text:
I went live on Whatnot last year and sold like $3k for a fundraiser in one hour with no clue what I was doing.

No one in ecomm appreciates what’s happening over there right now.

It is NOT just resellers.

I know brands doing 6 figures in 1-2 hour streams.

Of new product, that’s available on their site, at or close to list price… sometimes even more when things get crazy.

Absolutely insane platform.

Also if I was looking for a side hustle right now - it’d be reselling on whatnot.

Just an incredible platform.

kept.text:
Reklam bütçesine ayda 50 bin basıp siteye gelen 100 kişinin 98inin iz bırakmadan çıktığını fark etmeyen bir sürü mağaza sahibi var.

Neden https://t.co/MYyLYyfcFI anlatıyorum. 

Email bırakmıyor.

Telefon bırakmıyor.

Sepete ürün atıp gidiyor.

Sen de ertesi gün aynı adama tekrar reklam gösterip aynı parayı ikinci kez ödüyorsun.

Retargeting sanıyorsun, aslında vergi ödüyorsun.

WhatsApp sepet kurtarmanın kritik yeri burada.

Email açılma oranı yüzde 15 bandında sürünürken WhatsApp mesajı 3 dakikada okunuyor.

EGrow gibi araçlar terk edilen sepetlerin yüzde 35ine kadar geri kazanım iddia ediyor ki bu rakam doğruysa bile sadece yarısını tutturabilsen reklam bütçenin ROASı ikiye katlanır.

Çünkü bu satışlar için tek kuruş yeni reklam harcamıyorsun.

Ama millet burayı yanlış kuruyor.

Adam sepeti terk etti, 2 saat sonra mesaj atıyorsun.

Geç kaldın.

Kişi o 2 saatte rakibin sitesine gitti, fiyat karşılaştırdı, belki sipariş bile verdi.

Kritik pencere çıkış niyeti değil, vazgeçmeyi düşünmeye başlamadan önceki an.

Checkoutta 90 saniye duraksayana mesaj gider, siteden çıkana değil.

Bir de şunu kabul etmek lazım: Shopify Flow ile bunu otomatik kurmak istiyorsun, Upworkte bu işi bilen freelancer profili kategorisi bile yok.

Talep var, arz sıfır.

Yani ya kendin öğreneceksin ya hazır uygulamaya mahkumsun.

Reklam kreatifini 10 kez A/B test ediyorsun ama sepete gelip giden 3.000 kişiye tek bir hatırlatma göndermiyorsun.

Kasadaki delik burada, kreatifte değil.
